prompt: Create a realistic fashion portrait of a fair, beautiful, slightly curvy young Pakistani woman seated beside a bright turquoise swimming pool at an upscale resort. She wears a stylish modern white Pakistani designer outfit with elegant cream-white embroidery, including a long embroidered kameez with ornate floral threadwork and lace-trimmed cuffs, paired with a lightweight semi-transparent chiffon dupatta draped fashionably across the chest and over both shoulders. Her posture is elegant and relaxed, sitting on a white poolside lounger or bench with her hands folded gently on her lap, body angled slightly left. She has dark brown soft wet-hair look, loose and pushed back from the face. The face should be intentionally anonymized by a centered opaque rectangular blur/block in a warm beige skin tone covering the full facial features, while the rest of the portrait remains sharp and natural. Background: shimmering blue pool water filling most of the frame, white sun loungers in soft focus on the left, flowering white shrubs and modern resort architecture in the distance, bright daylight with soft bokeh. Composition: vertical 4:5 image, upper-body to seated three-quarter portrait, subject centered slightly right, shallow depth of field, natural soft lighting, high-end editorial fashion photography, clean airy white-and-aqua color palette, realistic fabric texture, no text, no watermark.
